query:
UPDATE route
                SET
                    ship_symbol = $1,
                    "from" = $2,
                    "to" = $3,
                    distance = $4,
                    nav_mode = $5,
                    fuel_cost = $6,
                    travel_time = $7,
                    ship_info_before = $8,
                    ship_info_after = $9
                WHERE id = $10
